title: Resilience in Whisky, Food and Drink Value Chains: technology, cooperation and youth are the answer if funding is provided
subtitle: Participatory appraisal of vulnerability and performance of value chains
description: Stakeholders from the Speyside whisky and food and drink tourism value chains identified key threats including demographic changes, inflation, and low water flows. They proposed solutions such as youth engagement initiatives, renewable energy adoption, and water-saving interventions to enhance sector resilience, though implementation is limited by funding shortages.
